cannot_assert: The network does not prove physical binding, molecular flux, spatial contact, causality, or cross-donor reproducibility.
confirmed: The graph uses the full 9 by 9 aggregate CellChat net weight matrix; edge width is relative inferred weight and node size is total incoming plus outgoing weight.
interpretable: All nine nodes, directional arrowheads, self-loops, and relative edge widths are readable despite the intentionally dense full-network view.
recommendation: Keep as an overview and pair with the filtered chord and ligand-receptor bubble views for detail.
visible: Title, all node labels, nodes, edges, and arrowheads are present without clipping in both sizes.
